docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,910.00 FILED BY JAIR, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT MARATHON RENT-A-CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARATHON RENT-A-CAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAIR, JACK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARATHON RENT-A-CAR $2,910.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,957.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,130.84 AS TO DEFENDANT MARATHON RENT-A-CAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARATHON RENT-A-CAR
